summary: Iteration 59: Testing Tracciabilità Materiali features. Found and FIXED a critical bug - frontend was calling non-existent endpoint /material-batches instead of /fpc/batches. All backend APIs working correctly. UI verified with correct sections and empty state messages.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/fpc/batches?commessa_id=xxx: PASS - Filter parameter accepted and working
backend_api_tests.GET /api/material-batches: PASS - Correctly returns 404 (endpoint does not exist)

frontend_ui_tests.tracciabilita_section: PASS - Section visible with correct header
frontend_ui_tests.empty_state_message: PASS - Shows 'Nessun materiale tracciato' when empty
frontend_ui_tests.document_type_dropdown: PASS - All 8 document types available (certificato_31, altro, ddt_fornitore, etc.)
frontend_ui_tests.carica_file_button: PASS - Upload button visible and clickable

wrong_endpoint_bug.issue: Frontend was calling /material-batches which doesn't exist
wrong_endpoint_bug.fix: Changed to /fpc/batches to use correct endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: Line 118 in CommessaOpsPanel.js was calling apiRequest('/material-batches?commessa_id=') which returned 404. Changed to '/fpc/batches?commessa_id=' which is the correct endpoint.

The /api/fpc/batches endpoint with commessa_id filter is working correctly but material_batches don't have commessa_id by default - only batches explicitly linked to a commessa will appear in Tracciabilità section
Documents with metadata_estratti.numero_colata will show in Tracciabilità Materiali section after AI OCR analysis
Analizza AI button correctly shows for certificato_31, altro, and ddt_fornitore document types when document is PDF and has no extracted metadata
test_credentials: Dynamic test session created and cleaned up after testing
seed_data_creation: Test commessa com_39cefc9bbb91 (NF-2026-000001) and test batch bat_a6c08326edec created and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tracciabilità Materiali feature working correctly after bug fix. The frontend now calls /fpc/batches?commessa_id= correctly. To test AI extraction, upload a PDF certificate (tipo: certificato_31, altro, or ddt_fornitore) and click 'Analizza AI' button. Extracted data (numero_colata, qualita_acciaio, fornitore, normativa) will appear in green box on document card and in Tracciabilità Materiali section.
